ai_disclosure: Content developed with AI assistance. Reviewed and approved by the author.
audience: Adult users (18+) in academic or professional contexts
name: AUGMANITAI Periodic Table
description: Interactive periodic table of 100 core AUGMANITAI terms for human-AI interaction. Element-card grid with category coloring, keyboard navigation, full-text search, hover tooltips, and modal detail views. Curated public excerpt from the 1000-term AUGMANITAI compendium. Single-file HTML artifact with hand-written vanilla JS, no CDN dependencies.

referencePublication.name: AUGMANITAI Research Programme: terminology and phenomenology of human-AI interaction
referencePublication.author: Andreas Ehstand
